# gd32-bridge canonical wire-test vectors
#
# Both the host-side driver tests (tests/zephyr/chips/gd32g553/) and
# the firmware-side unit tests (gd32-bridge/tests/) consume this file
# so the two implementations cannot diverge.
#
# Format: one vector per non-comment line, `<name> = <hex>` where
# <hex> is a sequence of byte values with no separators.  Whitespace
# is ignored; lines beginning with `#` are comments.
#
# Vectors below are regenerated by `python3 tests/gen_protocol_vectors.py`
# any time the framing layer changes.  Re-run the generator and commit
# both this file and the corresponding driver / firmware updates in
# the same change.


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# §1. Foundational CRC-16/CCITT-FALSE vector
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# "123456789" (ASCII) -- the canonical CRC-16/CCITT-FALSE test input
crc16_ccitt_false_ref_string   = 313233343536373839
# expected output: 0x29B1 (universally cited)
crc16_ccitt_false_ref_result   = 29B1
# helper: extra trailing '0' catches truncated walks
crc16_ccitt_false_test_string  = 31323334353637383930

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# §2. SPI envelopes -- two-transaction request / reply pattern
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# SOF | CMD=0x00 (PING) | CRC -- empty payload
spi_ping_request               = A500FF84
# SOF | STATUS=0x00 (OK) | CRC -- empty payload
spi_ping_reply_ok              = A500FF84
# SOF | CMD=0x01 (GET_VERSION) | CRC -- empty payload
spi_get_version_request        = A501EFA5
# SOF | STATUS=0x00 | major=0 | minor=5 | patch=0 | CRC
spi_get_version_reply_v0_5_0   = A500000500E7CA

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# §3. I2C envelopes -- register-style framing
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# regaddr=0x00 | CMD=0x00 | CRC -- CRC excludes the regaddr byte
i2c_ping_write                 = 0000E1F0
# STATUS=0x00 | CRC -- empty payload
i2c_ping_read_ok               = 00E1F0

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# §4. v0.2 additions -- DAC, quadrature encoder, free-running counter
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# SOF | CMD=0x50 | channel=0 | resv=0 | value_mv=1650 (LE 0x0672) | CRC
spi_dac_set_ch0_1650mv_request = A55000007206B7F6
# SOF | CMD=0x51 | channel=1 | CRC
spi_dac_get_ch1_request        = A55101B75F
# SOF | CMD=0x60 | encoder=0 | CRC
spi_qenc_read_ch0_request      = A5600091DA
# SOF | CMD=0x61 | encoder=3 | CRC
spi_qenc_reset_ch3_request     = A561039288
# SOF | CMD=0x70 | counter=0 | CRC
spi_counter_read_ch0_request   = A5700092A9
# SOF | STATUS=0x06 (NOSUPPORT) | empty payload | CRC -- stub-firmware reply for any v0.2+ opcode whose HAL body is not yet wired
spi_reply_nosupport            = A5069F42

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# §5. v0.3 additions -- GD32G5 HW knobs (PWM_CONFIGURE, ADC_CONFIGURE,
#                       ADC_STREAM_BEGIN / READ / END, TRNG_READ)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# SOF | CMD=0x22 | channel=0 | align=CENTER_UP | dead_time_ns=2000 | break_en | CRC
spi_pwm_configure_ch0_request  = A5220001D007000001B070
# SOF | CMD=0x32 | channel=3 | oversample=16 | sample_cycles~92 | resolution=16 | CRC
spi_adc_configure_ch3_request  = A532030010005F0010029C
# SOF | CMD=0x33 | stream_id=0 | channel=0 | rate_hz=1000 | CRC
spi_adc_stream_begin_stream0_ch0_1ksps_request = A533000000E8030000A120
# SOF | CMD=0x34 | stream_id=0 | max_samples=32 | CRC -- reply length is 1 + max_samples*2 + 2 (CRC) bytes regardless of how many samples the firmware actually returns
spi_adc_stream_read_stream0_max32_request = A5340020EFF4
# SOF | CMD=0x35 | stream_id=0 | CRC
spi_adc_stream_end_stream0_request = A535006090
# SOF | CMD=0x80 | request 16 bytes of true random | CRC -- host receives 16 bytes of GD32G5 TRNG (NIST SP800-90B)
spi_trng_read_16_request       = A580109359

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# §6. v0.4 additions -- GD32G5 TMU (CORDIC) math accelerator
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# SOF | CMD=0x90 | function=SQRT | format=F32 | in_a=4.0f (LE 0x40800000) | in_b=0 | CRC -- bridge replies 2.0f as 4 reply payload bytes + STATUS
spi_tmu_compute_sqrt_f32_4p0_request = A59005010000000080400000000055AB

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# §7. v0.5 additions -- ADC-stream DSP pipeline (reserved opcode)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# SOF | CMD=0x36 | (no payload yet) | CRC -- v0.5 reserved opcode; firmware replies STATUS_NOSUPPORT via the default-case dispatch until the wave-2 wire payload format finalises in v0.5.x
spi_adc_stream_configure_dsp_probe_request = A536A911

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# §8. v0.5 additions (§2B.2) -- advanced timer extras (reserved opcodes)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# SOF | CMD=0x23 | channel=0 | edge=BOTH | CRC -- v0.5 reserved opcode; firmware replies STATUS_NOSUPPORT until the GD32-side input-capture HAL body is wired in a follow-up firmware drop
spi_pwm_capture_begin_probe_request = A52300022D27
# SOF | CMD=0x26 | channel=0 | pulse_ns=1000 (LE 0x000003E8) | CRC -- v0.5 reserved opcode; firmware replies STATUS_NOSUPPORT until the GD32-side one-shot pulse HAL body is wired
spi_pwm_single_pulse_probe_request = A52600000000E80300005B7D

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# §9. v0.5 additions (§2B.3) -- system power-mode set (reserved opcode)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# SOF | CMD=0x28 | mode=DEEP_SLEEP | wake_bitmap=RTC|GPIO | wake_after_ms=10000 (LE 0x00002710) | CRC -- v0.5 reserved opcode; firmware replies STATUS_NOSUPPORT until the wake handler + supervisor re-init state machine land
spi_power_mode_set_probe_request = A5280200030000001027000048A3

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# §10. v0.5 additions (§2B wave-2) -- chunked DSP-chain upload
#       (CHAIN_OPEN / STAGE_PUSH / CHAIN_BIND; reserved opcodes)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# SOF | CMD=0x37 | (no payload) | CRC -- v0.5 reserved opcode; firmware replies STATUS_NOSUPPORT today via default-case dispatch.  Eventual reply payload is chain_id:u8.
spi_adc_dsp_chain_open_probe_request = A537B930
# SOF | CMD=0x38 | chain_id=0 | stage_index=0 | kind=WINDOW(2) | chunk_offset=0 | chunk_total_size=4 | shape=Hann | reserved[3] | CRC -- v0.5 reserved opcode; firmware replies STATUS_NOSUPPORT until the wave-2 HAL body lands.
spi_adc_dsp_stage_push_window_hann_request = A53800000200000400010000000420
# SOF | CMD=0x39 | chain_id=0 | stream_id=0 | CRC -- v0.5 reserved opcode; firmware replies STATUS_NOSUPPORT until the wave-2 HAL body lands.
spi_adc_dsp_chain_bind_probe_request = A539000089C7
